title: Junior Software Engineer
description:
Junior Software Engineer responsible for supporting the development, testing, and maintenance of software applications and systems. The role focuses on building strong engineering fundamentals, contributing to real\\-world projects, and working closely with experienced developers to deliver reliable and scalable software solutions.
 



 This position is ideal for individuals looking to accelerate their technical growth while gaining hands\\-on exposure to modern software development practices.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 



* Assist in the development and maintenance of software applications and services
* Write clean, structured, and maintainable code following engineering standards
* Participate in feature development, bug fixes, and system enhancements
* Collaborate with senior engineers to design and implement technical solutions
* Troubleshoot and resolve software defects and performance issues
* Support testing, debugging, and validation of applications
* Participate in code reviews and incorporate feedback into development work
* Work with APIs, databases, and backend systems as part of development projects
* Maintain technical documentation for applications and development activities
* Continuously learn new technologies, tools, and engineering best practices



**What You'll Be Working On** 



* Software application development
* Feature implementation and enhancements
* API integrations and backend services
* Bug fixing and performance improvements
* Testing and quality assurance activities



**Required Skills** 



* Understanding of programming fundamentals and object\\-oriented concepts
* Knowledge of Java, Python, JavaScript, C\\+\\+, or similar programming languages
* Basic understanding of databases and SQL
* Familiarity with software development lifecycle concepts
* Knowledge of Git or version control systems
* Strong analytical and problem\\-solving abilities
* Eagerness to learn and adapt to new technologies



**Qualifications** 



* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or related field
* 0–2 years of experience, internship experience, or relevant academic projects



**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Exposure to frameworks such as Spring Boot, React, Node.js, or similar technologies
* Familiarity with web applications, APIs, and cloud concepts
* Participation in coding competitions, hackathons, or open\\-source projects
* Understanding of agile development methodologies



**Success in This Role** 



* Delivering quality code and technical solutions
* Learning quickly and applying feedback effectively
* Contributing to project goals and team objectives
* Building strong software engineering foundations

title: Senior Java Software Engineer
description:
Senior Java Developer responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining enterprise\\-grade applications and scalable backend systems. The role focuses on building high\\-performance services, driving technical excellence, and contributing to architecture decisions that support business growth and product scalability.
 



 This position requires deep expertise in Java development, strong problem\\-solving capabilities, and the ability to work on complex, large\\-scale systems.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 



* Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend applications using Java technologies

* Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code following engineering best practices
* Participate in system architecture and technical design discussions
* Optimize application performance, scalability, and reliability
* Troubleshoot and resolve complex production issues and system bottlenecks
* Collaborate with product managers, architects, and engineering teams on feature delivery
* Conduct code reviews and ensure adherence to coding standards
* Mentor junior developers and contribute to technical knowledge sharing
* Maintain technical documentation for applications, services, and architecture decisions



**What You'll Be Working On** 



* Enterprise applications and backend platforms
* Microservices and distributed architectures
* API development and system integrations
* Performance optimization and scalability initiatives

**Required Skills** 



* Strong proficiency in Java and object\\-oriented programming principles

title: AI/ML Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 YMinds.AI is a pioneering technology company dedicated to transforming the landscape of artificial intelligence and machine learning solutions. With a focus on innovation, YMinds.AI develops cutting\\-edge products and services that empower businesses to harness the full potential of AI. Our team comprises industry experts and forward\\-thinking professionals committed to delivering scalable and impactful solutions across various sectors including healthcare, finance, retail, and more. At YMinds.AI, we foster a collaborative environment that encourages continuous learning, creativity, and the pursuit of excellence, ensuring that both our clients and employees thrive in a rapidly evolving digital world.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly motivated and skilled AI Software Engineer to join our dynamic team at YMinds.AI. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing, developing, and deploying advanced AI and machine learning models that address complex business challenges. You will collaborate closely with data scientists, product managers, and other engineering teams to translate innovative ideas into scalable solutions. The ideal candidate will have a passion for technology, a strong foundation in software development, and a keen interest in artificial intelligence. This position offers an excellent opportunity to work on impactful projects, contribute to the advancement of AI technology, and grow your expertise within a forward\\-thinking organization.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should possess a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Data Science, or a related field. Proven experience in developing AI and machine learning models, with proficiency in programming languages such as Python, Java, or C\\+\\+. Familiarity with AI frameworks and libraries like TensorFlow, PyTorch, or scikit\\-learn is essential. Strong understanding of data structures, algorithms, and software development best practices is required. Excellent problem\\-solving skills, the ability to work independently and as part of a team, and effective communication skills are also important. Prior experience working in a cloud environment (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud) and knowledge of DevOps practices will be considered a plus.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Design, develop, and optimize machine learning models and AI algorithms to meet project requirements. Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to understand business needs and translate them into technical solutions. Implement scalable and efficient code, ensuring high performance and reliability of AI systems. Conduct data analysis, feature engineering, and model validation to improve accuracy and effectiveness. Maintain and update existing AI models, troubleshoot issues, and enhance system functionalities. Stay updated with the latest advancements in AI and machine learning to incorporate innovative techniques into projects. Document technical specifications, processes, and best practices to ensure knowledge sharing and project continuity. Participate in code reviews, testing, and deployment activities to ensure quality and robustness of solutions.
   

  

**Benefits**
 YMinds.AI offers a competitive salary package complemented by comprehensive health insurance plans. Employees enjoy flexible working hours and the possibility of remote work to support work\\-life balance. We invest in professional development through training programs, workshops, and conferences to enhance your skills and career growth. Our collaborative work environment fosters innovation and creativity, providing opportunities to work on challenging projects with cutting\\-edge technologies. Additional benefits include paid time off, performance\\-based bonuses, and a vibrant company culture that values diversity and inclusion. Joining YMinds.AI means becoming part of a forward\\-thinking organization committed to your success and growth in the AI industry.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 YMinds.AI is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, ethnicity, gender, age, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that a diverse workforce drives innovation and reflects the communities we serve. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to any protected status. We are dedicated to fostering a workplace where everyone feels valued, respected, and empowered to contribute to our collective success.

title: Software Engineer Intern (3-6 Months Unpaid)
description:

 Matrilens is India’s trusted service for matrimonial background verification, helping individuals and families make safe and informed marriage decisions. Specializing in pre\\-marriage investigations, NRI background checks, and relationship fraud detection, Matrilens ensures transparency and security before committing to marriage. With a vast network across India and a confidential approach, Matrilens provides reliable and timely reports. Our mission prioritizes protecting individuals from unsuitable marriages, hidden surprises, and scams, offering comprehensive verification of personal, financial, and legal histories.
   




**Role Description**

 This is a full\\-time remote Software Engineer Intern role, lasting 3\\-6 months, and is unpaid. As an intern, you will assist in designing, developing, and maintaining back\\-end systems and software solutions. Day\\-to\\-day responsibilities include programming, debugging, and collaborating with the team to develop scalable and efficient systems. You will utilize your computer science knowledge to contribute to ongoing and new development projects.
   




**Qualifications**
* Strong foundation in Computer Science principles and problem\\-solving
* Proficiency in Back\\-End Web Development and Software Development
* Experience with Programming and Object\\-Oriented Programming (OOP)
* Familiarity with coding practices and debugging techniques
* Ability to work autonomously in a remote environment
* Strong communication and collaboration skills
* Currently pursuing or completed a degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field
* Experience with version control systems (e.g., Git) is a plus
